errors: OOM error: MXFP4 quantized Qwen3-32B requires more GPU memory than available (22GB GPU). The auto_round MX linear layer's unpack_fp4_from_uint8 operation requires a contiguous ~500MB buffer that cannot be allocated alongside activation memory. Even with maximal offloading (max_memory=500MB), the model still OOMs during the first forward pass. This model requires more GPU memory than available.
